prose:
Phenol Fukui reactivity descriptors — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP; exact four-center integrals, no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point on user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz` (no optimization). SCF converged. Partial charges from Mulliken. 

Results:
• Most electrophilic site: C3 (atom label 3) with f⁺ = 2.1028319
• Most nucleophilic site: O1 (atom label 1) with f⁻ = 0.16201477
Dual descriptor values (atom labels 1–13): [-1.1571515, 0.35055934, 2.0318596, 1.549182, -0.36871143, -0.31005766, 1.1844598, -0.81623893, -0.36280394, -0.99816656, -0.7104033, -0.38941253, -0.0031148173]

Live JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp4cvd1r2r/live.json`. Command: 
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp4cvd1r2r/live.json`
